inference::Recovery: DNN operator inference accuracy; network topology correctness; dimension inference accuracy; parameter inference accuracy; recompilation behavioral equivalence
artifact-class::Text streams: Instruction trac; memory-access trace; runtime-value trace | Taint trace; Symbolic constraint; Symbolic expression
artifact-form::Graph: Text Streams; Text Streams; Text Streams -> Graph
canonicalization::Transform: Per-callsite memory address (Intel Pin hooks every callsite at runtime to record input/output addresses)
artifact-class::Logical expressions: Taint trace; Symbolic constraint; Symbolic expression
artifact-form::Numeric descriptor: Text Streams; Logical Expressions; Logical Expressions -> Numeric descriptor

papers.title: EMBERSim: A Large-Scale Databank for Boosting Similarity Search in Malware Analysis
papers.evaluationMetric: Top-K label homogeneity; Relevance@K; Exact match; Jaccard index; Normalized edit similarity; mAP

inference::Detection: Top-K label homogeneity; Relevance@K; Exact match; Jaccard index; Normalized edit similarity; mAP
artifact-class::Binary facts: Header; sections; imports; exports; histogram; entropy; strings
artifact-class::Numerical statistics: Header; sections; imports; exports; histogram; entropy; strings
artifact-class::String literals: Header; sections; imports; exports; histogram; entropy; strings
artifact-form::Numeric descriptor: Binary Facts; Binary Facts; Binary Facts; Binary Facts; Numerical Statistics; Numerical Statistics; String Literals-> Numeric descriptor

papers.title: DeepReflect: Discovering Malicious Functionality through Binary Reconstruction
papers.evaluationMetric: MSE; localized MSE (LMSE); ROC curve; true positive rate (TPR); false positive rate (FPR); top-100 precision; Silhouette Coefficient; Davies-Bouldin Score; analyst-cluster match rate; highlighted-function percentage / search-space reduction

inference::Clustering: MSE; localized MSE (LMSE); ROC curve; true positive rate (TPR); false positive rate (FPR); top-100 precision; Silhouette Coefficient; Davies-Bouldin Score; analyst-cluster match rate; highlighted-function percentage / search-space reduction
artifact-form::Numeric descriptor: Code representaion; Graph representation -> Numeric descriptor
canonicalization::Scale: Function-level (per-function basic blocks from BinaryNinja CFG; m = first 20000 basic blocks per binary because 95 percent of dataset samples have <= 20K basic blocks)
